export const menuData = {
  "en": {
    "categories": [
      {
        "id": "breakfast",
        "name": "Breakfast",
        "subtitle": "Awaken to nature's morning embrace",
        "motif": "dawn",
        "items": [
          {
            "id": "b1",
            "name": "Forest Mushroom Omelette",
            "description": "Wild foraged mushrooms, aged cheddar, fresh herbs from our garden",
            "price": 185,
            "image": "/images/breakfast/forest-mushroom-omelette.jpg",
            "badges": [
              "V"
            ],
            "chefRec": true
          },
          {
            "id": "b2",
            "name": "Organic Açai Bowl",
            "description": "House-made granola, seasonal berries, local honey drizzle",
            "price": 165,
            "image": "/images/breakfast/organic-acai-bowl.jpg",
            "badges": [
              "VE",
              "GF"
            ]
          },
          {
            "id": "b3",
            "name": "Turkish Breakfast Plateau",
            "description": "Artisan cheeses, village olives, fresh breads, jams, menemen",
            "price": 295,
            "image": "/images/breakfast/turkish-breakfast-plateau.jpg"
          },
          {
            "id": "b4",
            "name": "Avocado Toast Royale",
            "description": "Sourdough, smashed avocado, poached eggs, microgreens, truffle oil",
            "price": 175,
            "image": "/images/breakfast/avocado-toast-royale.jpg",
            "badges": [
              "V"
            ]
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "soups",
        "name": "Soups",
        "subtitle": "Warmth distilled from ancient recipes",
        "motif": "steam",
        "items": [
          {
            "id": "s1",
            "name": "Wild Forest Mushroom Bisque",
